metadata.description: Azure region for all POC resources.
Resource name prefix. The approved baseline is ms.
Foundry model name. Keep gpt-5.4 unless the user explicitly chooses a documented fallback.
Foundry model version. Keep 2026-03-05 for gpt-5.4.
RBAC propagation wait in seconds before creating the project capability host.
Azure region for the Foundry account.
Azure region for the Foundry project.
Azure region for connected resources metadata.

Foundry project resource ID. Baseline no-op compatibility input.

Project user-assigned managed identity principal ID. Baseline no-op compatibility input.

Project user-assigned managed identity principal ID.
Azure region for the deployment script.
Seconds to wait for RBAC propagation.

properties.scriptContent: [format('echo "Waiting {0} seconds for RBAC propagation" && sleep {1}', parameters('waitSeconds'), parameters('waitSeconds'))]
